name: Aeron Pentragon
description:
Aeron Pentragon is the King of the Acullon Empire, in Scotland. After the war against wizards/sorcerer, he banished magic from the Empire, killing those who dares to use it. He believes that magic will lead to nothing good, especially dark magic.
Inspired by the TV serie Merlin and the character Arthur Pentragon.
creator: Seiju
